title: stelis eustylis
intro: Stelis eustylis, also known as the Orchid of the Antilles, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Stelis eustylis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional.
